# Permly — Selective Notification Manager for Android

> Permly is a privacy-first Android app that lets you silence specific app notifications using custom profiles (Work, Sleep, Focus, etc.) without blocking everything. No ads, no data collection, no cloud sync — all settings stay on your device. Free to use; Pro unlocks unlimited profiles and extended statistics.

Permly is available on the Google Play Store. It requires Android 8.0 or higher and the Notification Access permission. It does not read notification content — it only acts on notification metadata (which app sent it) to decide whether to suppress it.

## App

- [Permly on Google Play](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.permly): Download the free Android app. Supports up to 3 custom notification profiles on the free tier.

## Pages

- [Home](https://permly.app/): Landing page with feature overview, screenshot gallery, pricing plans (Free / Pro Monthly $1.99 / Pro Yearly $14.99 / Pro Lifetime $29.99), and comparison with full-DND solutions.
- [Support & FAQ](https://permly.app/support): Answers to common questions — how profiles work, how to fix notifications not being blocked, battery optimisation, differences between Free and Pro, and how to contact support.
- [Privacy Policy](https://permly.app/privacy-policy): Full privacy policy. Permly collects zero personal data. No analytics, no crash reporting, no third-party SDKs. All data (profiles, stats) is stored locally on the device.
- [Terms of Service](https://permly.app/terms-of-service): Terms covering app usage, in-app purchases, subscription cancellation, and refund policy.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](https://permly.app/privacy-policy): Confirms Permly uses only two system permissions — Notification Access (to intercept and suppress notifications) and POST_NOTIFICATIONS (Android 13+ status notification). No internet permission is requested.
